mapper.sql: select cc.code_no_cd from common_code cc where cc.group_code_no = 'FACILITY_TY' and nvl(cc.use_yn, 'Y') = 'Y' and cc.code_no_cd not in ()

select cmn_facility_no , count(*) as item_cnt , sum(case when cmn_facility_stts_cd = 'REPAIR' then 1 else 0 end) as repair_cnt , sum(case when cmn_facility_stts_cd = 'CLOSE' then 1 else 0 end) as close_cnt from public_item group by cmn_facility_no
mapper.select: select f.facility_no , f.facility_ty_cd , f.instl_dt , f.facility_nm , f.apt_cmplex_no , f.dong_no , f.loc_cn , nvl(f.use_yn, 'Y') as use_yn , f.file_group_no , cc.code_name as facility_ty_nm , au.dong_nm from facility f left join common_code cc on cc.group_code_no = 'FACILITY_TY' and cc.code_no_cd = f.facility_ty_cd left join apt_unit au on au.dong_no = f.dong_no where f.apt_cmplex_no = and nvl(f.use_yn, 'Y') = 'Y' and f.facility_ty_cd in () and not exists ( select 1 from public_facility pf where pf.facility_no = f.facility_no ) order by f.facility_nm asc

select distinct f.dong_no , au.dong_nm from facility f left join apt_unit au on au.dong_no = f.dong_no where f.apt_cmplex_no = and f.facility_ty_cd in () and nvl(f.use_yn, 'Y') = 'Y' and f.dong_no is not null order by au.dong_nm asc

select distinct f.loc_cn from facility f where f.apt_cmplex_no = and f.facility_ty_cd in () and nvl(f.use_yn, 'Y') = 'Y' and f.loc_cn is not null
and f.dong_no = #{dongNo}
and f.dong_no is null
order by f.loc_cn asc

select cmn_facility_nm from ( select distinct nvl(pf.cmn_facility_nm, f.facility_nm) as cmn_facility_nm from facility f left join public_facility pf on pf.facility_no = f.facility_no and pf.apt_cmplex_no = f.apt_cmplex_no where f.apt_cmplex_no = and f.facility_ty_cd in () and nvl(f.use_yn, 'Y') = 'Y' and nvl(pf.cmn_facility_nm, f.facility_nm) is not null
and lower(nvl(pf.cmn_facility_nm, f.facility_nm)) like '%' || lower(#{keyword}) || '%'
order by cmn_facility_nm asc ) where rownum <= 10

select pf.cmn_facility_no , pf.apt_cmplex_no , pf.facility_no , pf.cmn_facility_nm , pf.cmn_facility_cn , pf.cmn_facility_amt , pf.cmn_facility_rsv_yn , pf.cmn_facility_opr_hr , to_char(pf.reg_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as reg_dt , to_char(pf.mdf_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as mdf_dt , f.facility_nm , f.facility_ty_cd , cc.code_name as facility_ty_nm , to_char(f.instl_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as instl_dt , f.dong_no , au.dong_nm , f.loc_cn , nvl(f.use_yn, 'Y') as use_yn , f.file_group_no , nvl(pi.item_cnt, 0) as item_cnt , nvl(pi.repair_cnt, 0) as repair_cnt , nvl(pi.close_cnt, 0) as close_cnt , case when nvl(pi.close_cnt, 0) > 0 then 'CLOSE_PART' when nvl(pi.repair_cnt, 0) > 0 then 'REPAIR_PART' else 'NORMAL' end as oper_status from public_facility pf inner join facility f on f.facility_no = pf.facility_no left join common_code cc on cc.group_code_no = 'FACILITY_TY' and cc.code_no_cd = f.facility_ty_cd left join apt_unit au on au.dong_no = f.dong_no left join (
) pi on pi.cmn_facility_no = pf.cmn_facility_no where pf.cmn_facility_no = #{cmnFacilityNo} and pf.apt_cmplex_no =
select facility_no , facility_ty_cd , instl_dt , facility_nm , apt_cmplex_no , dong_no , loc_cn , use_yn , file_group_no from facility where facility_no = #{facilityNo}
